title: French Chocolate Mousse
ingredients: ¼ cup plus 2 tablespoons sugar, divided
Whipped cream and chocolate shavings, for garnish
instructions: Melt chocolate and butter together in a heatproof bowl set over barely simmering water, stirring until smooth.
Remove from heat and cool slightly.
Whisk in egg yolks one at a time.
In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until foamy.
Add cream of tartar and continue beating.
Gradually add ¼ cup sugar and beat until stiff peaks form.
In another bowl, whip cold cream until slightly thickened.
Add remaining 2 tablespoons sugar and vanilla, then whip to soft peaks.
Fold egg whites gently into the chocolate mixture to lighten it.
Fold in whipped cream just until combined.
Divide into serving glasses and cover.
Garnish with whipped cream and chocolate shavings before serving.
notes: This recipe uses raw egg whites; use pasteurized eggs if you have food safety concerns.
